route.sourceNote: Planning package geometry resolved from donner_truckee_summit.gpx. Local BRouter trekking-profile route draft linking Soda Springs, Hampshire Rocks, Granite Flat/Donner Memorial, and Donner Pass.
route.description: California Plan Ready Donner Summit / South Yuba local draft with BRouter geometry and named camp anchors. It remains Plan Ready only until camp availability, closure/access, water, fire/smoke/weather, and export QA are complete.
route.surfaceMix: Mountain route with substantial climbing; road/trail exposure needs review.
route.bestSeason: Summer/fall after snow, subject to fire/smoke.
